NCT03945188.name: ELEVATE UC 52
NCT03945188.group: Moderate-severe UC, etrasimod 2 mg PO daily vs placebo (wk 12, clinical remission RR; ELEVATE UC 52)

allOutcomes.title: Clinical remission at week 12 (primary; ELEVATE UC 52 induction)

NCT03945188.snippet: Source: Sandborn WJ et al. Lancet 2023;401:1159-1171 (ELEVATE UC 52).

evidence.label: Eligibility (AACT-derived)
evidence.text: AACT-derived (auto-populated 2026-05-04). Sex: ALL; min age 16 Years; max age 80 Years; healthy volunteers: f. CRITERIA: "Inclusion criteria:~1. Diagnosed with ulcerative colitis (UC) ≥ 3 months prior to screening~2. Active UC confirmed by endoscopy~Exclusion criteria:~1. Severe extensive colitis~2. Diagnosis of Crohn's disease (CD) or indeterminate colitis or the presence or history of a fistula consistent with CD~3. Diagnosis of microscopic colitis, ischemic colitis, or infectious colitis"
